name: Frontier Group Holdings, Inc.
business: Frontier Group Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiary Frontier Airlines, provides low-fare passenger airline service primarily to leisure travelers. It generates revenue from base fares and ancillary services such as baggage fees, seat selection, and bundled products. The company operates a fleet of Airbus A320 family aircraft and serves domestic and select international destinations.

exposures.sentence: We primarily sell our product through direct distribution channels, including via our website and mobile app.
Our other revenues also include services such as our FRONTIER Miles affinity credit card program and commissions revenue from the sale of items such as rental cars and hotels.
Our brand includes our focus on sustainability and environmental responsibility efforts.
We depend on a sole-source supplier for our aircraft and two suppliers for our engines.
In particular, ICAO has adopted rules, including those pertaining to CORSIA, which will require us to address the growth in CO2 emissions of a significant majority of our international flights.

catalysts.event: Introduction of First Class Seating (First Seats)
catalysts.sentence: Premium seating options, including planned First Class Seating (First Seats) seating by the end of 2026
planned offering of onboard Wi-Fi by the end of 2027
As of December 31, 2025, we had a firm purchase commitment with Airbus to acquire 168 A320neo family aircraft, including 24 aircraft in 2026.
